strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise matching the primary stack
Current hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test libraries, and creator of testing workshops/courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin exposure absent and Java experience appears dated/limited to niche projects (robotic arms)
Significant investment in DLang ecosystem, a niche skill with limited transferability to this stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java coverage

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with senior/staff roles across product companies, demonstrating end-to-end delivery in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Rare for this requirement set, he has direct, current AI-agent infrastructure experience. His testing depth (TDD, test frameworks, teaching) fits the quality-focused responsibilities well. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js) and secondary-language depth (Kotlin/Java), both learnable given his demonstrated polyglot track record.
